objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: momentum_macd
archetype: momentum_macd
family: momentum
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- macd(fast_period=13, slow_period=32, signal_period=8)
- rsi(period=7)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: macd.macd crosses_above macd.signal and rsi > 45 and rsi < 60
- short: macd.macd crosses_below macd.signal and rsi > 30 and rsi < 60
exit:
- condition: macd.histogram changes sign or rsi > 80 or rsi < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.25
tp_atr_mult: 2.0
description: ATR stop-loss (1.25x) and take-profit (2.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: The momentum strategy combined with the MACD indicator will improve trading signals by taking into account both price and volatility.
